description_long: This object is a group of four classic arcade game cabinets, each showing significant signs of age and wear, with faded and chipped paint, graffiti, and grime covering much of their surfaces. The cabinets are rectangular with a slanted front face, featuring a screen area, control panel, and a lower section likely for coin operation. The side panels display colorful, retro-themed artwork, including racing and sci-fi motifs, though much of the detail is obscured by dirt and damage. The control panels are equipped with joysticks and multiple buttons, arranged for single or two-player gameplay, and the screens are set back within deep bezels. Marquee artwork is present at the top of each cabinet, with bold, stylized text and vibrant graphics, though these too are heavily weathered. The overall appearance suggests these cabinets have been exposed to harsh urban environments, possibly abandoned or left in a neglected arcade or street setting.
description: A group of four heavily weathered arcade game cabinets with faded artwork, dirty screens, and worn control panels. Each cabinet features retro graphics, joysticks, and buttons, with visible marquee art at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screens, control panels with joysticks and buttons, and the marquee artwork of all four cabinets.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the worn, dirty surfaces and the arrangement of the cabinets in a row.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the cabinets, with less visible artwork and more exposed, damaged surfaces.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the colorful, retro-themed side panel graphics and the depth of the cabinets.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with deep bezels and visible grime
attribute_control_panel_layout: Each cabinet has a control panel with one or two joysticks and several round buttons, arranged for single or two-player play, with faded colored markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present on all cabinets, featuring bold, retro-themed text and graphics in vibrant colors, though heavily faded and damaged
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Colorful, retro-themed artwork with racing and sci-fi motifs, including bold lines and stylized imagery, though much is obscured by dirt and wear
